commands.name: clone
commands.description: Clone a repository into a new directory

tokens.name: repository
tokens.description: The repository URL or path to clone

tokens.name: directory
tokens.description: Target directory name for the clone

tokens.name: branch
tokens.description: Checkout this branch instead of the remote HEAD

tokens.name: depth
tokens.description: Create a shallow clone with history truncated to the specified number of commits

tokens.name: single-branch
tokens.description: Clone only the history leading to the tip of a single branch

tokens.name: no-checkout
tokens.description: No checkout of HEAD is performed after the clone is complete

tokens.name: bare
tokens.description: Make a bare Git repository

tokens.name: mirror
tokens.description: Set up a mirror of the source repository (implies --bare)

tokens.name: origin
tokens.description: Use this name for the remote instead of 'origin'

tokens.name: recurse-submodules
tokens.description: Initialize and clone submodules

tokens.name: shallow-submodules
tokens.description: Shallow clone submodules with a depth of 1

tokens.name: jobs
tokens.description: Number of submodules fetched at the same time

tokens.name: filter
tokens.description: Partial clone filter spec (e.g. blob:none)

tokens.name: sparse
tokens.description: Employ a sparse-checkout with only files in the toplevel directory

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Operate quietly

tokens.name: verbose
tokens.description: Run verbosely

tokens.name: progress
tokens.description: Force progress status output

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create an empty Git repository or reinitialize an existing one

tokens.name: directory
tokens.description: Directory in which to create the repository

tokens.name: bare
tokens.description: Create a bare repository

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Only print error and warning messages

tokens.name: initial-branch
tokens.description: Use the specified name for the initial branch

tokens.name: template
tokens.description: Directory from which templates will be used

tokens.name: separate-git-dir
tokens.description: Create a text file containing the path to the actual repository

tokens.name: object-format
tokens.description: Specify the hash algorithm for the repository

tokens.name: ref-format
tokens.description: Specify the ref storage format for the repository

tokens.name: shared
tokens.description: Specify that the repository is to be shared amongst several users

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add file contents to the index

tokens.name: pathspec
tokens.description: Files to add content from

tokens.name: all
tokens.description: Add all changes (new, modified, deleted files)

tokens.name: dry-run
tokens.description: Don't actually add the file(s), just show what would happen

tokens.name: verbose
tokens.description: Be verbose

tokens.name: force
tokens.description: Allow adding otherwise ignored files

tokens.name: interactive
tokens.description: Add modified contents interactively

tokens.name: patch
tokens.description: Interactively choose hunks of patch to add

tokens.name: edit
tokens.description: Open the diff in an editor to edit before staging

tokens.name: update
tokens.description: Update the index only where it already has an entry

tokens.name: intent-to-add
tokens.description: Record only that the path will be added later

tokens.name: refresh
tokens.description: Don't add files, only refresh stat() information in the index

tokens.name: ignore-errors
tokens.description: Continue adding other files if some cannot be added due to errors

tokens.name: sparse
tokens.description: Allow updating index entries outside of the sparse-checkout cone

tokens.name: chmod
tokens.description: Override the executable bit of the added files

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Record changes to the repository

tokens.name: message
tokens.description: Use the given string as the commit message

tokens.name: all
tokens.description: Automatically stage modified and deleted files before committing

tokens.name: amend
tokens.description: Replace the tip of the current branch by creating a new commit

tokens.name: no-edit
tokens.description: Use the selected commit message without launching an editor

tokens.name: signoff
tokens.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer by the committer

tokens.name: author
tokens.description: Override the commit author

tokens.name: date
tokens.description: Override the author date used in the commit

tokens.name: file
tokens.description: Take the commit message from the given file

tokens.name: template
tokens.description: Start the editor with the contents in the given file

tokens.name: reuse-message
tokens.description: Take an existing commit object and reuse the log message and authorship

tokens.name: reedit-message
tokens.description: Like -C, but with -c the editor is invoked for editing

tokens.name: fixup
tokens.description: Construct a commit for use with rebase --autosquash

tokens.name: squash
tokens.description: Construct a squash commit message for rebase --autosquash

tokens.name: gpg-sign
tokens.description: GPG-sign the commit

tokens.name: allow-empty
tokens.description: Allow creating a commit with no changes

tokens.name: allow-empty-message
tokens.description: Allow creating a commit with an empty message

tokens.name: verbose
tokens.description: Show unified diff between HEAD commit and what would be committed

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Suppress commit summary message

tokens.name: dry-run
tokens.description: Do not create a commit, just show status

tokens.name: reset-author
tokens.description: Reset the author to the committer

tokens.name: trailer
tokens.description: Add a (token, value) pair as a trailer

tokens.name: no-verify
tokens.description: Bypass the pre-commit and commit-msg hooks

tokens.name: pathspec
tokens.description: Commit only the specified files

commands.name: push
commands.description: Update remote refs along with associated objects

tokens.name: repository
tokens.description: The remote repository destination

tokens.name: refspec
tokens.description: Specify what destination ref to update with what source object

tokens.name: all
tokens.description: Push all branches

tokens.name: tags
tokens.description: Push all refs under refs/tags

tokens.name: force
tokens.description: Force updates (can cause remote to lose commits)

tokens.name: force-with-lease
tokens.description: Force push only if remote ref matches expected value

tokens.name: force-if-includes
tokens.description: Refuse to force push if remote tip is not in local reflog

tokens.name: delete
tokens.description: Delete the specified remote branches

tokens.name: prune
tokens.description: Remove remote branches that don't have a local counterpart

tokens.name: mirror
tokens.description: Push all refs under refs/

tokens.name: dry-run
tokens.description: Do everything except actually send the updates

tokens.name: porcelain
tokens.description: Produce machine-readable output

tokens.name: set-upstream
tokens.description: Set upstream for every branch that is push'd successfully

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Suppress all output

tokens.name: verbose
tokens.description: Run verbosely

tokens.name: no-verify
tokens.description: Bypass the pre-push hook

tokens.name: follow-tags
tokens.description: Push annotated tags reachable from pushed commits

tokens.name: atomic
tokens.description: Use an atomic transaction on the remote side

tokens.name: signed
tokens.description: GPG sign the push

tokens.name: recurse-submodules
tokens.description: Control recursive pushing of submodules

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Fetch from and integrate with another repository or a local branch

tokens.name: repository
tokens.description: The remote repository to pull from

tokens.name: refspec
tokens.description: Remote branch to pull

tokens.name: rebase
tokens.description: Rebase the current branch on top of the upstream branch after fetching

tokens.name: no-rebase
tokens.description: Do not rebase (merge instead)

tokens.name: ff-only
tokens.description: Only update if fast-forward is possible

tokens.name: ff
tokens.description: Allow fast-forward merge when possible

tokens.name: no-ff
tokens.description: Create a merge commit even if fast-forward is possible

tokens.name: commit
tokens.description: Perform the merge and commit the result

tokens.name: no-commit
tokens.description: Perform the merge but stop before creating a merge commit

tokens.name: squash
tokens.description: Squash the fetched commits into a single commit

tokens.name: autostash
tokens.description: Automatically create a temporary stash before and apply after

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Suppress output during fetching and merging

tokens.name: verbose
tokens.description: Pass --verbose to git-fetch and git-merge

tokens.name: depth
tokens.description: Limit fetching to the specified number of commits

tokens.name: strategy
tokens.description: Use the given merge strategy

tokens.name: strategy-option
tokens.description: Pass strategy-specific option to the merge strategy

tokens.name: gpg-sign
tokens.description: GPG-sign the resulting merge commit

tokens.name: recurse-submodules
tokens.description: Control if submodule commits should be fetched

commands.name: fetch

tokens.name: repository
tokens.description: The remote repository to fetch from

tokens.name: refspec
tokens.description: Refs to fetch

tokens.name: all
tokens.description: Fetch all remotes

tokens.name: prune
tokens.description: Remove any remote-tracking references that no longer exist on the remote

tokens.name: prune-tags
tokens.description: Remove any local tags that no longer exist on the remote

tokens.name: tags
tokens.description: Fetch all tags from the remote

tokens.name: no-tags
tokens.description: Do not automatically fetch tags

tokens.name: depth
tokens.description: Limit fetching to the specified number of commits from the tip

tokens.name: deepen
tokens.description: Deepen the history by the specified number of commits

tokens.name: unshallow
tokens.description: Convert a shallow repository to a complete one

tokens.name: force
tokens.description: Force update of local refs

tokens.name: dry-run
tokens.description: Show what would be done without making changes

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Silence output

tokens.name: verbose
tokens.description: Be verbose

tokens.name: jobs
tokens.description: Number of parallel children for fetching submodules

tokens.name: multiple
tokens.description: Allow several repository and group arguments

tokens.name: recurse-submodules
tokens.description: Control recursive fetching of submodules

tokens.name: shallow-since
tokens.description: Deepen or shorten history to include commits after the given date

tokens.name: shallow-exclude
tokens.description: Exclude commits reachable from a specified remote branch or tag

tokens.name: porcelain
tokens.description: Print output in an easy-to-parse format

tokens.name: push

tokens.name: add-url
tokens.description: Add new URL instead of changing existing (for set-url)

tokens.name: delete-url
tokens.description: Delete all URLs matching regex (for set-url)

tokens.name: fetch
tokens.description: Run git fetch after adding the remote (for add)

tokens.name: tags
tokens.description: Import tags from the remote (for add)

tokens.name: no-tags
tokens.description: Don't import tags from the remote (for add)

tokens.name: mirror
tokens.description: Set up as a mirror (for add)

tokens.name: prune
tokens.description: Prune stale remote-tracking branches (for update)

tokens.name: dry-run
tokens.description: Report what would be pruned without actually pruning (for prune)

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Reset current HEAD to the specified state

tokens.name: commit
tokens.description: Commit to reset to (defaults to HEAD)

tokens.name: pathspec
tokens.description: Paths to reset in the index

tokens.name: soft
tokens.description: Reset HEAD only, leave index and working tree unchanged

tokens.name: mixed
tokens.description: Reset HEAD and index, leave working tree unchanged (default)

tokens.name: hard
tokens.description: Reset HEAD, index, and working tree

tokens.name: merge
tokens.description: Reset HEAD and index, update working tree files that differ

tokens.name: keep
tokens.description: Reset HEAD, update working tree files that differ between commit and HEAD

tokens.name: patch
tokens.description: Interactively select hunks to reset

tokens.name: quiet
tokens.description: Be quiet, only report errors

tokens.name: recurse-submodules
tokens.description: Recursively reset submodule working trees

tokens.name: pathspec-from-file
tokens.description: Read pathspec from file instead of command line

commands.name: revert
commands.description: Revert some existing commits

tokens.name: commit
tokens.description: Commits to revert

tokens.name: edit
tokens.description: Edit the commit message before committing the revert

tokens.name: no-edit
tokens.description: Do not start the commit message editor

tokens.name: mainline
tokens.description: Specify the parent number for reverting a merge commit

tokens.name: no-commit
tokens.description: Apply changes to working tree and index without committing

tokens.name: signoff
tokens.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer

tokens.name: gpg-sign
tokens.description: GPG-sign commits

tokens.name: strategy
tokens.description: Use the given merge strategy

tokens.name: strategy-option
tokens.description: Pass strategy-specific option through to the merge strategy

tokens.name: cleanup
tokens.description: How to clean up the commit message

tokens.name: continue
tokens.description: Continue the revert after resolving conflicts

tokens.name: skip
tokens.description: Skip the current commit and continue

tokens.name: abort
tokens.description: Cancel the revert and return to pre-revert state

tokens.name: quit
tokens.description: Forget about the revert in progress

commands.name: cherry-pick
commands.description: Apply the changes introduced by some existing commits

tokens.name: commit
tokens.description: Commits to cherry-pick

tokens.name: edit
tokens.description: Edit the commit message before committing

tokens.name: no-commit
tokens.description: Apply changes without making any commit

tokens.name: mainline
tokens.description: Specify the parent number for cherry-picking a merge commit

tokens.name: signoff
tokens.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer

tokens.name: gpg-sign
tokens.description: GPG-sign commits

tokens.name: x
tokens.description: Append 'cherry picked from commit ...' to the commit message

tokens.name: ff
tokens.description: If current HEAD is the same as the parent, fast-forward instead

tokens.name: strategy
tokens.description: Use the given merge strategy

tokens.name: strategy-option
tokens.description: Pass strategy-specific option to the merge strategy

tokens.name: cleanup
tokens.description: How to clean up the commit message

tokens.name: allow-empty
tokens.description: Allow cherry-picking an empty commit

tokens.name: allow-empty-message
tokens.description: Allow cherry-picking with an empty commit message

tokens.name: continue
tokens.description: Continue the cherry-pick after resolving conflicts

tokens.name: skip
tokens.description: Skip the current commit and continue

tokens.name: abort
tokens.description: Cancel the cherry-pick and return to pre-operation state

tokens.name: quit
tokens.description: Forget about the cherry-pick in progress

commands.name: show
commands.description: Show various types of objects

tokens.name: object
tokens.description: Object to show (defaults to HEAD)

tokens.name: pretty
tokens.description: Pretty-print the commit logs in a given format

tokens.name: oneline
tokens.description: Shorthand for --pretty=oneline --abbrev-commit

tokens.name: abbrev-commit
tokens.description: Show abbreviated commit object name

tokens.name: no-abbrev-commit
tokens.description: Show the full commit object name

tokens.name: patch
tokens.description: Generate patch output

tokens.name: no-patch
tokens.description: Suppress diff output

tokens.name: stat
tokens.description: Generate a diffstat

tokens.name: shortstat
tokens.description: Show only the last line of --stat

tokens.name: name-only
tokens.description: Show only names of changed files

tokens.name: name-status
tokens.description: Show names and status of changed files

tokens.name: encoding
tokens.description: Re-code commit log message in the given encoding

tokens.name: notes
tokens.description: Show notes that annotate the commit

tokens.name: no-notes
tokens.description: Do not show notes

tokens.name: diff-algorithm
tokens.description: Choose a diff algorithm

tokens.name: color
tokens.description: Show colored diff

tokens.name: no-color
tokens.description: Turn off colored diff

tokens.name: expand-tabs
tokens.description: Perform tab expansion in the log message
